message:
fix: reduce lock scope in GetDynamicClient to match GetClient (#10262)

Apply the same lock-reduction pattern from PR #9334 (GetClient) to
GetDynamicClient. Previously, GetDynamicClient held the global write
lock during slow kubeconfig discovery and exec credential plugin
execution, serializing client construction for all clusters. Now uses
RLock for cache check, builds the client outside the lock, and only
acquires the write lock briefly for map insertion.

Fixes #10255

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
